name: Caesars Entertainment, Inc.
business: We are a geographically diversified gaming and hospitality company. Our primary source of revenue is generated by our gaming operations, which includes our casino properties, retail and online sports betting and online gaming. Additionally, we utilize our hotels, restaurants, bars, entertainment, racing, retail shops and other services to attract customers to our properties.
sellsTo: Online sports bettors and iGaming users

exposures.sentence: Our primary source of revenue is generated by our gaming operations, which includes our casino properties, retail and online sports betting and online gaming.

We operate and conduct sports wagering across 34 jurisdictions in North America, 27 of which offer online sports betting, and operate iGaming in five jurisdictions in North America as of December 31, 2025.
In 2025, we added the Caesars Racebook wagering interface to the Caesars Sportsbook app and launched a universal digital wallet to access funds and Caesars Rewards in one wallet.

We are vulnerable to compromises of our information systems and unauthorized access to confidential information or our customers personal information which could materially harm our reputation and business.

We also have contracts to purchase energy from solar covered parking canopies completed at two Atlantic City properties, we installed solar covered parking at Harrah's Pompano Beach and the Harrah's Atlantic City convention center solar rooftop project is expected to be completed in 2026.

catalysts.event: Harrah's Atlantic City convention center solar rooftop project completion
catalysts.sentence: the Harrah's Atlantic City convention center solar rooftop project is expected to be completed in 2026.

catalysts.event: Next variable rent adjustment under VICI Leases
catalysts.sentence: The next such lease year with a variable rent adjustment begins November 2027.

catalysts.event: VICI put-call right election period expiration
catalysts.sentence: VICI's election period expires on December 31, 2028.

catalysts.event: Full redemption of CEI Senior Notes due 2027
catalysts.sentence: On July 8, 2025, we fully redeemed all of the $546 million outstanding principal amount of the CEI Senior Notes due 2027

catalysts.event: Maturity of CEI Revolving Credit Facility
catalysts.sentence: The CEI Revolving Credit Facility will mature on January 31, 2028.
